title: L o | District p | onsor Ba | Present Position
rows: Started in a temporary premises at Vazhuthacaud on 26.08.2009. G.O. allotting the land already identified at Vattiyoorkavu has been received.
Presently functioning at Kottiyam in a Government Building at a nominal rent of Rs. 500/- p.m. 85 cents land plot approved at Kottiyam. Allocation letter awaited from Government.

Functioning at rented premises at Pathanamthitta. Land development of Elanthoor plot is not feasible due to high cost. Planning to acquire new land nearly Pathanamthitta District Head Quarter at a cost of around Rs. 80 lakhs with building of 7500 Sq. ft. approximately. The matter is under discussion at various levels.
To furnish temporary premises, quotations have been called for planning to start by December 2009. Land of 75 cents, earmarked already, awaiting Government allotment letter.

Rented premises approved by SBT, HO (Jawahar Balabhavan – old Canara Bank Temple Road Branch Building). Planning to start by December 2009 after necessary renovations. Discussion with various Government Department level is going on for transfer of land at Pallom block.

Functioning from 2008 at a rent free Government premises Land identified at Kalkoonthal Village (90 cents) + an additional 65 cents of land is being negotiated with Government. In contact with various Government Departments for transfer of land.

Functioning in own 1 acre building (Union Bank of India Branch and Currency Chest are also functioning in the Building) 50 cents of land has already been earmarked at Mazhuvanoor Village. Requested for an additional 25 cents. Proposal is pending with Government.
Functioning at ETC, Mannuthy from 27.02.2009. G.O. allotting the land already identified at Vilvattam has been received.
Temporary premises has been identified at Vellinezhi and taken up with HO for permission. Allotment letter is awaited from Government for the identified land.
Existing Training Institute is there in Wandoor
Temporary premises identified at Kozhikkode (Block Office Compound). Modification to be made before starting. G.O. allotting the land already identified at Kunnamangalam Village has been received..
Canara Bank & Syndicate Bank are running a combined institute at Kannapuram Foundation stone laid for new premises to be constructed.
Functioning in a rented Building. Land identified. Allocation letter from Government not received.

Andhra Bank’s claim has been accepted as per D.O.No.70537/DD3/09/LSGD dated 05.12.2009 of Principal Secretary, Dept. of Local Self Government, Government of Kerala. (Copy of the DO letter is shown as Annexure 10.44.)
